halted_lts.lt_name: Articulating Personal Values and Character Development

statements.statement: I can name things that are important to me with adult support.
I can describe my personal values and explain how they help me make choices.
I can analyse my core values and character strengths across different life situations.
I can evaluate how my values and character development influence complex decisions and future goals.
I can work with others to create simple materials that show kindness and fairness.
I can collaborate to design materials that clearly communicate messages about treating everyone with respect.
I can collaborate to design persuasive materials that effectively challenge specific forms of discrimination and bias.
I can collaborate to design sophisticated materials that strategically promote inclusion across diverse contexts and audiences.
I can show I am listening by looking at the speaker and nodding.
I can demonstrate active listening through eye contact, appropriate responses, and simple clarifying questions.
I can demonstrate active listening using verbal and non-verbal cues while asking thoughtful clarifying questions.
I can demonstrate sophisticated active listening across diverse contexts using nuanced verbal and non-verbal responses.

statements.statement: I can start simple conversations with new people using basic greetings and questions.
I can initiate conversations with unfamiliar people and keep them going by asking follow-up questions.
I can confidently start and sustain meaningful conversations with strangers across different social situations.
I can skillfully initiate and maintain engaging conversations with unfamiliar people while adapting to their communication styles.
I can break down simple familiar tasks into basic steps with adult guidance.
I can break down moderately complex tasks into clear sequential steps independently.
I can break down complex multi-part tasks into detailed achievable steps with logical reasoning.
I can break down highly complex unfamiliar tasks into comprehensive sequential steps and justify my approach.
I can change a problem into what I want to happen with teacher help.
I can reframe simple problems as clear goals that describe what I want to achieve.
I can systematically reframe complex problems as specific solution-oriented goals across different situations.
I can independently reframe multifaceted problems as precise outcome-focused goals and justify my reframing approach.
